Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site.reason: Discussion hypothesizes MLG oligosaccharides are released into extracellular space/apoplast, but this location was not directly measured in Results.

Terminal_Metabolite_Function.reason: The paper states MLG-derived oligosaccharides may act as DAMPs and genetic/biochemical data support activation of defence signalling via OsLecRK1.

Core_Phenotypic_Effect.reason: Results show OsLecRK1 binds MLG oligosaccharides and that lecrk1/3 knockout abolishes enhanced BPH/WBPH resistance of OsCslF6 overexpressors.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: All three listed findings are in Results/Figure 6: MST binding with micromolar KD and no binding to CTE, stimulation by BGTRIB/BGTETB, and loss of F6OE resistance in lecrk1/3 background.

Core_Validation_Method.reason: These methods are explicitly described: MST, in vitro phosphorylation assay, protoplast assay, CRISPR knockout in F6OE background, and insect feeding assays.

Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.reason: OsLecRK1-related experiments involved BPH, WBPH, and BGTRIB/BGTETB treatments.

Subcellular_Localization.reason: Summary and Discussion describe OsLecRK1 as plasma membrane-anchored/localized.

Interacting_Proteins.reason: Direct interaction with OsLecRK3 was not shown; the paper only shows combined genetic knockout. Binding to BGTRIA/B/BGTETB/C is supported, but these are not proteins.

Potential_Tradeoffs.reason: Results state 3-week-old F6OE4 oslecrk1/3 and oslecrk1/3 seedlings were smaller than wild-type under normal conditions.

Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: The paper suggests CslF6 genes as breeding targets, but does not explicitly propose OsLecRK1 itself as a breeding target.

Other_Important_Info.reason: Results support acting downstream of OsCslF6 genetically, and direct ligand binding was shown for OsLecRK1 but not OsLecRK2.

Source_Species.reason: The gene studied is from rice.

Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.reason: The phenotypes were tested under BPH and WBPH infestation.

Potential_Tradeoffs.reason: Results state F6OE4 oslecrk1/3 and oslecrk1/3 seedlings were smaller than wild type under normal conditions.
